docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY KEJELA JOTE AS TO DEFENDANT OSAGIE OROBO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-01-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

POS ON SUBPOENA TO JAMES HAGGERTY FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KEJELA JOTE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OSAGIE OROBO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,545.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
